artifact: Joins races to circuits and returns years for races at circuits located in Shanghai.
sql: SELECT DISTINCT r.year FROM races r JOIN circuits c ON r."circuitId" = c.circuitid WHERE c.location = 'Shanghai' ORDER BY r.year;

raw_response.sql: SELECT DISTINCT r.year FROM races r JOIN circuits c ON r."circuitId" = c.circuitid WHERE c.location = 'Shanghai' ORDER BY r.year;
raw_response.artifact: Joins races to circuits and returns years for races at circuits located in Shanghai.
